scope: Focused non-module audit: 6 un-audited code/gams-checkable reference docs (GAMS_Advanced_Features, GAMS_Best_Practices, GAMS_Control_Structures, GAMS_Functions_Operations, Infeasibility_Debugging_Guide, Verification_Protocol). klass=reference (gams.com + develop).
outcome: HIGH yield (35 confirmed bugs, 5 Critical) - the low-yield prediction was WRONG

per_doc.label: GAMS_Advanced_Features
per_doc.key: GAMS-language content all correct (gams.com). All 6 bugs in MAgPIE example citations: Critical fabricated im_demandshare_reg+f17_prod_init (M17); v10_lu_transitions->vm_lu_transitions; M56/M80 line drift; vm_production/vm_trade fabricated.

per_doc.label: GAMS_Best_Practices
per_doc.key: Cleanest. 1 Minor: 'option tuning=1' invalid GAMS (CPLEX tuning is cplex.opt via .optfile=1). pm_population/pm_total_land pedagogical placeholders -> deferred (not flagged).

per_doc.label: GAMS_Control_Structures
per_doc.key: GAMS semantics correct. 3 Critical fabricated example code (q10_land_from/v10_lu_transitions; im_demandshare_reg/f17_prod_init; p35_maturesecdf FORMULA [name is real]); 6 citation drifts (several OOR); 1 Major: inline 'code; * comment' is multiplication not comment. Verifier CORRECTED the comment-fix scope (GCS-B1).

per_doc.label: GAMS_Functions_Operations
per_doc.key: Critical: hallucinated v10_lu_transitions x2 (real=vm_lu_transitions); 3 Major (line drift; fabricated indexed-op quote; equations.gms:32->37). GAMS semantics/operator tables OK.

per_doc.label: Infeasibility_Debugging_Guide
per_doc.key: 7/10. Semantic: modelstat 7 = Feasible not 'Intermediate infeasible' (self-contradicts at 9.5). 3 config:line drifts; eq-cite to wrong equation; non-default mechanism as default. Verifier CORRECTED INFEAS-B7 (line 62->64) + INFEAS-B9 (tc default config:2293->293, auditor cited s80_optfile's line).

per_doc.label: Verification_Protocol
per_doc.key: Process body sound; the worked examples that teach '100% accuracy' contain 3 Major + 2 Minor: wrong module name (22 vs 44 for bv_btc), OOR cite, content-mismatch f22_bii cite, broken ref, fabricated vars in gold-standard examples. Ironic but real.

key_finding: The reference/GAMS docs' GAMS-LANGUAGE content is correct (gams.com-verified), but their MAgPIE EXAMPLE code was never code-verified and is full of fabricated identifiers (im_demandshare_reg, v10_lu_transitions->vm_lu_transitions, q10_land_from, f17_prod_init, vm_production/vm_trade) + citation drift. Meta-checked: those 3 fabrications confirmed ABSENT in develop; vm_lu_transitions real (M29/M59); p35_maturesecdf is a REAL param (the Critical was its fabricated FORMULA, not the name).
prediction_correction: I (the agent) predicted these docs LOW-yield; they were HIGH-yield (35 bugs / 5 Critical). Lesson: 'reference' docs that embed domain EXAMPLES need the same code-verification as substance docs - the examples drift and hallucinate identifiers even when the language content they teach is correct. The worked examples in process docs (Verification_Protocol) that teach accuracy were themselves inaccurate.
verifier_performance: 30 upheld + 3 CORRECTED (GCS-B1 comment-fix scope; INFEAS-B7 62->64; INFEAS-B9 caught the auditor citing config:2293=s80_optfile instead of the real tc default :293) + 0 refuted + 0 citation_failed. The producer/declaration + citation-content machinery validated again in production.
